findings.evidence: `Prod.lean:19-21` says it supplies the binary-biproduct ingredient for the representation category; `rg -n "ComoduleCat\.(prod|coprod|biproduct)|HasBinaryBiproducts|BinaryBiproduct|HasBinaryProducts|HasBinaryCoproducts|IsLimit|IsColimit" code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/ComoduleCat.lean` returns no declarations.
findings.fix: Add the bundled `ComoduleCat` binary product/coproduct/biproduct declarations, or narrow the public claim so this PR is explicitly only an unbundled prerequisite.
findings.issue: The file claims to supply the binary-biproduct ingredient for the comodule representation category, but exposes only unbundled `Comodule.Hom` maps and no `ComoduleCat` product/coproduct/biproduct or limit API.

summary: The unbundled product/comodule morphism API is mostly characterized and the identity decomposition gap is fixed, but the PR still does not expose the category-level product/coproduct/biproduct interface needed by its stated representation-category target.
